title: Bad Bunny Wins Latin Tour of the Year at 37th Pollstar Awards for Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour
detail: At the 37th Annual Pollstar Awards ceremony held at the Loews Hollywood Hotel in Los Angeles on April 15, 2026, Bad Bunny was named Latin Tour of the Year for the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour. The ceremony — hosted by iHeartRadio's Valentine — recognized the tour alongside Major Tour of the Year winner Oasis ('Oasis Live '25 Tour'), Rock Tour of the Year winner Metallica, and Hip-Hop Tour of the Year winner Kendrick Lamar/SZA. The Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour, which launched November 21, 2025 in Santo Domingo and runs through July 22, 2026 in Brussels, spans six continents and includes no U.S. dates — a deliberate statement about immigration policy. The Pollstar win comes on the heels of Bad Bunny's Grammy Album of the Year win (February 2026), his Latin Grammy Album of the Year win (November 2025), and his historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance (February 8, 2026).

media.caption: Bad Bunny wins Latin Tour of the Year at the 37th Pollstar Awards for the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour
